data.title: Australia flags crypto oversight concerns for 2026, aims to address regulatory gaps through new licensing laws.
data.description: As Canberra takes steps to address regulatory gaps in the digital-asset sector, a caution has been issued. This comes alongside the introduction of long-awaited licensing legislation aimed at bolstering oversight and control.

data.title: Melania Memecoin surpasses Bitcoin and Dogecoin with 5% growth and $23.85M volume as Trump promotes documentary.
data.description: An unprecedented surge was witnessed in the cryptocurrency world on Monday as the Official Melania coin (MELANIA) took center stage with an impressive performance. This Solana-based memecoin saw a remarkable 5% increase in the last 24 hours, accompanied by a staggering 23% surge in trading volume, reaching $23.85 million. In this impressive display, MELANIA outperformed major assets like Bitcoin (BTC) and Dogecoin (DOGE), as well as the Official Trump memecoin (TRUMP) linked to former President Donald Trump. The latest 24-hour and year-to-date gains for these cryptocurrencies are as follows: Official Melania: +4.94%, +45.48% Bitcoin: +0.94%, -1.04% Dogecoin: +0.50%, +4.60% Official Trump: -0.73%, -0.20%. Speculative activity surrounding MELANIA also saw a notable increase, with open interest in the coin reaching...

data.title: Security flaw in Clawdbot AI assistant exposes 100s of servers, leaking API keys due to misconfigured proxies, say experts.
data.description: Cybersecurity experts are cautioning about a serious security flaw in the Clawdbot AI assistant, which has led to the exposure of numerous servers. This breach has resulted in the leakage of API keys and other critical data because of poorly configured proxies. It is estimated that hundreds of servers have been affected by this vulnerability, highlighting the importance of robust cybersecurity measures to safeguard sensitive information.

data.title: Meta official refutes accessing WhatsApp chats in the US court case with 3 billion users affected by alleged privacy breach.
data.description: A US district court lawsuit plaintiffs have alleged that Meta has been granted backdoor access to WhatsApp conversations, potentially compromising the privacy of over 3 billion users.

data.title: Global M&A activity to continue momentum in 2026 with 80% of executives aiming to sustain or increase deals post-rebound in 2025, says Bain & Co survey. Technology, geopolitics, and portfolio strategies to drive M&A trends in 2026.
data.description: A recent survey conducted by Bain revealed that 80% of merger and acquisition (M&A) executives anticipate maintaining or growing deal volume in the year 2026. This positive outlook follows a significant resurgence in deal-making in 2025. Factors such as technology disruption, geopolitical events, the post-globalization landscape, and changing portfolio approaches are expected to influence M&A trends in 2026. For example, the integration of artificial intelligence (AI) is becoming increasingly prevalent in M&A processes, signaling a shift towards more tech-driven strategies in the industry.
